2026-04-24T09:08:22.3991104Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-24T09:08:22.3991672Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-24T09:08:22.3992112Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-24T09:08:22.3992493Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-24T09:08:22.3992855Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-24T09:08:22.3993087Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-24T09:08:22.3993243Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-24T09:08:22.3993431Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-24T09:08:22.3993603Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-24T09:08:22.3993836Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-24T09:08:22.3994035Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-24T09:08:22.3994322Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-24T09:08:22.3994577Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m

This only happens in .NET 10, not in .NET 8.\\nIf other kind of async tasks are Cancelled, those are not reported.\\n\\nOr is there any way to filter out TaskCanceledException when reported from the HttpClient?\\nOr have I missed some setting?\\nOr is this an issue with the HttpClient?\\n\\nFor us, this leads to a substantial amount of reported Exceptions that should be ignored, also leads to Azure Monitor reporting lots of false Alert Exception Anomalies...\\n\\n### Expected behavior\\n\\nSince a normal TaskCanceledException is not reported, we did not expect TaskCanceledException from the HttpClient to be reported.\\nAlso in .NET 8, it is not reported, as expected.\\n\\n### Actual behavior\\n\\nThis is reported (sorry about the Swedish text in the stack trace):\\nSystem.Threading.Tasks.TaskCanceledException: The operation was canceled.\\n ---\\u003e System.IO.IOException: Unable to read data from the transport connection: I/O-åtgärden har avbrutits därför att en tråd har avslutats eller för att ett program har begärt det..\\n ---\\u003e System.Net.Sockets.SocketException (995): I/O-åtgärden har avbrutits därför att en tråd har avslutats eller för att ett program har begärt det.\\n   --- End of inner exception stack trace ---\\n   at System.Net.Sockets.Socket.AwaitableSocketAsyncEventArgs.ThrowException(SocketError error, CancellationToken cancellationToken)\\n   at System.Net.Sockets.Socket.AwaitableSocketAsyncEventArgs.System.Threading.Tasks.Sources.IValueTaskSource\\u003cSystem.Int32\\u003e.GetResult(Int16 token)\\n   at System.Net.Http.HttpConnection.InitialFillAsync(Boolean async)\\n   at System.Net.Http.HttpConnection.SendAsync(HttpRequestMessage request, Boolean async, CancellationToken cancellationToken)\\n   --- End of inner exception stack trace ---\\n   at System.Net.Http.HttpConnection.SendAsync(HttpRequestMessage request, Boolean async, CancellationToken cancellationToken)\\n   at System.Net.Http.HttpConnectionPool.SendWithVersionDetectionAndRetryAsync(HttpRequestMessage request, Boolean async, Boolean doRequestAuth, CancellationToken cancellationToken)\\n   at System.Net.Http.Metrics.MetricsHandler.SendAsyncWithMetrics(HttpRequestMessage request, Boolean async, CancellationToken cancellationToken)\\n   at System.Net.Http.DiagnosticsHandler.SendAsyncCore(HttpRequestMessage request, Boolean async, CancellationToken cancellationToken)\\n\\n### Reproduction Steps\\n\\nCreate new Blazor Server .NET 10 project with sample pages.\\nAdd reference to: Azure.Monitor.OpenTelemetry.AspNetCore 1.4.0\\n\\nIn Program.cs (replace () =\\u003e await Task.Delay(5000));`\\n\\nIn Counter.razor (replace [MyPort] with the port used by the new project):\\n`private int currentCount;\\nCancellationTokenSource? _cancellationTokenSource;\\n\\n[Inject]\\nHttpClient HttpClient { get =\\u003e field ?? throw new Exception(\\\"Property HttpClient is not initialized\\\"); set; }\\n\\nprivate async Task IncrementCount()\\n{\\n    if (_cancellationTokenSource != null)\\n        await _cancellationTokenSource.CancelAsync();\\n    _cancellationTokenSource = new CancellationTokenSource();\\n\\n   await this.HttpClient.GetAsync(\\\"http://localhost:[MyPort]/test\\\", _cancellationTokenSource.Token);\\n\\n   // await Task.Delay(5000, _cancellationTokenSource.Token);\\n\\n    _cancellationTokenSource.Dispose();\\n    _cancellationTokenSource = null;\\n    \\n    currentCount++;\\n}`\\n\\n### Environment\\n\\nWindows 11\\n.NET 10.0.6\\nVisual Studio OpenTelemtry without UseAzureMonitorExporter\",\"body\":\"### Library name and version\\n\\nAzure.Monitor.OpenTelemetry.AspNetCore 1.4.0\\n\\n### Query/Question\\n\\nI currently have a solution using pure OTel .NET SDKs in ASP.NET Core, using the OtlpExporter forwarding to the native collector that then forwards the signals to various targets.\\n\\nAs I now need to send to Azure Monitor and don't want to use the community collector that should support Azure Monitor, I'm turning to using `Azure.Monitor.OpenTelemetry.AspNetCore`.\\n\\nThe docs lists usage that looks more or less like this:\\n\\n```csharp\\nservices.AddOpenTelemetry().UseAzureMonitorExporter(opts =\\u003e\\n{\\n    // Configure    \\n});\\n```\\n\\nThe solution I already have in place is controlled via existing config allowing for just adding the signals you want and it also uses OTel samplers etc. and only the instrumentation and metrics of interest.\\n\\n**Can I ignore doing the call to** `UseAzureMonitorExporter` and instead use your extension methods for each respective signals and use native samplers etc. or will I risk missing **important** features/tweaks from the Azure NuGet e.g. getting duplicated data or similar due to e.g. Azure SDKs using custom Http instrumentation or similar?\\n\\n**Simplified example Tracing and Metrics:**\\n\\n```csharp\\ntelemetryBuilder.WithMetrics(metrics =\\u003e\\n{\\n    metrics\\n        .SetResourceBuilder(resourceBuilder)\\n        .AddMeter(meters);\\n\\n    metrics.AddAzureMonitorMetricExporter(mo =\\u003e\\n    {\\n        mo.EnableLiveMetrics = false;\\n        mo.DisableOfflineStorage = true;\\n        mo.Credential = credential;\\n        mo.ConnectionString = connectionString;\\n    });\\n});\\n\\ntelemetryBuilder.WithTracing(tracing =\\u003e\\n{\\n    tracing\\n        .SetResourceBuilder(resourceBuilder)\\n        .AddSource(sources);\\n    \\n    var ratioSampler = new TraceIdRatioBasedSampler(samplingRatio);                \\n    tracing.SetSampler(new ParentBasedSampler(ratioSampler));\\n\\n    tracing\\n        .AddAspNetCoreInstrumentation()\\n        .AddHttpClientInstrumentation();\\n\\n    tracing.AddAzureMonitorTraceExporter(to =\\u003e\\n    {\\n        to.EnableLiveMetrics = false;\\n        to.DisableOfflineStorage = true;\\n        to.Credential = credential;\\n        to.ConnectionString = connectionString;\\n    });\\n});\\n```\\n\\n**Simplified example Logs:**\\n\\n```csharp\\nlogging.AddOpenTelemetry(lo =\\u003e\\n{\\n    lo.SetResourceBuilder(resourceBuilder);\\n\\n    lo.AddAzureMonitorLogExporter(alo =\\u003e\\n    {\\n        alo.EnableLiveMetrics = false;\\n        alo.DisableOfflineStorage = true;\\n        alo.Credential = credential;\\n        alo.ConnectionString = connectionString;\\n    });\\n});\\n```\\n\\n### When I use OTel ConsoleExporter or OtlpExporter everything is good, because access_token is redacted from spans attributes (I see that in console and in jaeger which I connect using OtlpExporter). But when I start use UseAzureMonitor it seems somehow affects this behavior and `access_token` query param is not redacted anymore.\\n\\nLibs:\\nAzure.Monitor.OpenTelemetry.Profiler 1.0.0-beta5\\nAzure.Monitor.OpenTelemetry.AspNetCore 1.4.0\\nOpenTelemetry 1.15.0\\nOpenTelemetry.Exporter.Console 1.15.0\\nOpenTelemetry.Exporter.OpenTelemetryProtocol 1.15.0\\nOpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting 1.15.0\\nOpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.AspNetCore 1.15.0\\nOpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.EventCounters 1.5.1-alpha.1\\nOpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.Http 1.15.0\\nOpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.Runtime 1.15.0\\nOpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.SqlClient 1.15.0\\n\\n\\n### Expected behavior\\n\\nI expect to see redacted access_token from url. \\n\\n\\u003cimg width=\\\"591\\\" height=\\\"422\\\" alt=\\\"Image\\\" src=\\\"https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/c83c4fe0-b7d3-4854-a946-e952db1ae34b\\\" /\\u003e\\n\\n### Actual Reproduction Steps\\n\\n```c#\\npublic static IServiceCollection AddTelemetry(this IServiceCollection services, IConfiguration configuration)\\n    {\\n        var options = new TelemetryOptions();\\n        configuration.GetSection(\\\"Telemetry\\\").Bind(options);\\n\\n        services\\n            .AddLogging()\\n            .AddOpenTelemetry()\\n            .ConfigureResource(e =\\u003e e.AddService(SERVICE_NAME))\\n            .WithTracing(tracing =\\u003e\\n            {\\n                tracing\\n                    .AddSqlClientInstrumentation()\\n                    .AddHttpClientInstrumentation()\\n                    .AddAspNetCoreInstrumentation();\\n            })\\n            .WithMetrics(metrics =\\u003e\\n            {\\n                metrics\\n                    .AddSqlClientInstrumentation()\\n                    .AddEventCountersInstrumentation(e =\\u003e\\n                    {\\n                        e.RefreshIntervalSecs = 5;\\n                    })\\n                    .AddRuntimeInstrumentation()\\n                    .AddHttpClientInstrumentation()\\n                    .AddAspNetCoreInstrumentation();\\n            })\\n            .WithLogging();\\n\\n        services\\n            .AddExporters(options);\\n\\n        return services;\\n    }\\n\\n    private static IServiceCollection AddExporters(this IServiceCollection services, TelemetryOptions options)\\n    {\\n        if (options.Exporters.AzureMonitor != null)\\n        {\\n            var exporter = options.Exporters.AzureMonitor;\\n\\n            services\\n                .AddOpenTelemetry()\\n                .UseAzureMonitor(e =\\u003e { e.ConnectionString = exporter.ConnectionString; })\\n                .AddAzureMonitorProfiler();\\n        }\\n\\n        if (options.Exporters.Otlp != null)\\n        {\\n            var exporter = options.Exporters.Otlp;\\n\\n            services\\n                .AddOpenTelemetry()\\n                .UseOtlpExporter(exporter.Protocol, exporter.BaseUrl);\\n        }\\n\\n        if (options.Exporters.Console != null)\\n        {\\n            var exporter = options.Exporters.Console;\\n\\n            services\\n                .AddOpenTelemetry()\\n                .WithTracing(e =\\u003e\\n                {\\n                    if (exporter.Tracing) e.AddConsoleExporter();\\n                })\\n                .WithMetrics(e =\\u003e\\n                {\\n                    if (exporter.Metrics) e.AddConsoleExporter();\\n                })\\n                .WithLogging(e =\\u003e\\n                {\\n                    if (exporter.Logging) e.AddConsoleExporter();\\n                });\\n        }\\n\\n        return services;\\n    }\\n```\\n\\n### Environment\\n\\n.NET
